title: Eli's Collection
body:
![custom-title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f841d1da10d19c11da9cf42dc046817094a8b69f.png)

--- ### 💡 Description This is a RPG-like kitchen-sink modpack made for me and my friends.\ There is no intention on iterating it or doing other things to it right now, but we'll see ^-^
Some of the mods you'll see - [PlayerEx](https://modrinth.com/mod/playerex) - [Goblin Traders](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/goblintraders-fabric) - [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric) - [Nature's](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/natures-compass) and [Explorer's](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/natures-compass) Compass
### Can you add {insert mod}? I will not. ALTHOUGH **you are free to do what you will**. ### No Quests? No, there are no quests. **I don’t plan on adding them for now**, but you’ll never know. ### Can I use my favourite texturepack? Will it work? It will. There are all of the Optifine features here.
⁉️ Diclaimer _*This was made for me and my friends, so it will not be *extremly* maintained.*_\ ***_None of this mods are made by me. For support or questions about certain mods go to the respective page and show some love to the original cretor(s)._***\ _NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT_
